name: kuryentrade
description: KuryenTrade - P2P Energy Trading Platform on Polkadot

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run contracts:node" "npm run frontend:dev" "npm run backend:dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install -w @kuryentrade/contracts && npm install -w @kuryentrade/frontend && npm install -w @kuryentrade/backend

author: KuryenTrade Team
